# ArtifactFlow

ArtifactFlow is a self-hosted team library for storing, searching, versioning, and safely previewing AI-generated single-file HTML artifacts, Markdown pages, and Mermaid diagrams. It stores and manages generated content; it does not generate it. Untrusted HTML executes only on a separate cookieless artifact origin.

- Home: https://artifactflow.app/
- Security architecture: https://artifactflow.app/security/
- MCP server: https://artifactflow.app/mcp/
- Self-hosting: https://artifactflow.app/self-hosting/
- Engineering harness: https://artifactflow.app/engineering-harness/
- Product roadmap: https://artifactflow.app/roadmap/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/Gadsotek/artifactflow
- Threat model: https://github.com/Gadsotek/artifactflow/blob/main/THREAT-MODEL.md
- Security policy: https://github.com/Gadsotek/artifactflow/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Operations guide: https://github.com/Gadsotek/artifactflow/blob/main/docs/OPERATIONS.md
